fileContext.overview: This file is responsible for building a dependency graph of source files, including their symbols and import relationships. It uses a combination of ctags and regex-based parsing to extract symbols and import statements.

symbols.name: buildDependencyGraph
symbols.purpose: Builds a dependency graph of source files
symbols.behavior: Takes an array of source file paths, extracts symbols and import relationships, and returns a dependency graph object
symbols.limitations: Requires ctags to be installed and configured properly

symbols.name: isCtagsAvailable
symbols.purpose: Checks if ctags is available on the system
symbols.behavior: Runs a ctags command with the --version flag and checks for errors
symbols.limitations: May return false positives if ctags is not properly installed or configured

symbols.name: extractSymbolsWithCtags
symbols.purpose: Extracts symbols from source files using ctags
symbols.behavior: Runs ctags with the --output-format=json flag and parses the output to extract symbols
symbols.limitations: Requires ctags to be installed and configured properly

symbols.name: extractSymbolsWithRegex
symbols.purpose: Extracts symbols from source files using regex-based parsing
symbols.behavior: Parses source files to extract symbols based on language-specific patterns
symbols.limitations: May not cover all possible symbol types or languages

symbols.name: extractImports
symbols.purpose: Extracts import relationships from source files
symbols.behavior: Parses source files to extract import statements based on language-specific patterns
symbols.parameters: content: string, currentFile: string, workspaceRoot: string, allFiles: Record<string, FileNode>
symbols.limitations: May not cover all possible import types or languages

symbols.name: buildImportGraph
symbols.purpose: Builds the import graph of source files
symbols.behavior: Parses source files to extract import relationships and updates the import graph
symbols.limitations: May not cover all possible import types or languages

symbols.name: normalizeKind
symbols.purpose: Normalizes the kind of a symbol
symbols.behavior: Maps ctags kind codes to human-readable symbol types
symbols.limitations: May not cover all possible kind codes

symbols.name: getLanguageFromPath
symbols.purpose: Determines the language of a source file
symbols.behavior: Parses the file extension to determine the language
symbols.limitations: May not cover all possible file extensions
